programmes.show_description: Electrifying all-action sequel! ''Action Man' Jason Statham returns as Stelios to track down a Chinese mobster who has stolen his heart and replaced it with a battery-powered ticker. (2009)
Riveting crime thriller with Oscar Isaac. A troubled artist drives into the desert seeking solitude, only to meet an unhinged drifter who throws his life drastically off course. (2015)
Sci-fi with Jack Coleman. A scientist scrambles to save his family - and the world - when a comet passes Earth and shifts the planet's magnetic field, leading to a deadly storm. (2009)
A Western film star faces a real shoot-out with the legendary Jesse James. S3, Ep20
An old man believes a child's game holds the magical power to restore youth. S3, Ep21
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A piano displays the mysterious power to reveal a person's true character. S3, Ep22
A man's funeral is interrupted when he calmly climbs out of his coffin. S3, Ep23
Sci-Fi thriller. When a soldier is wounded in the line of duty, he is teleported to the planet Barsoom. There, he must face hostile aliens to fight for his survival. (2009)

Nautical drama with Adam Baldwin. Disaster strikes at sea when a luxury liner is capsized by a terrorist bomb, uniting a group of strangers in a struggle to survive.  S1, Ep1(2005)

A sheriff frames a gentle giant for the sabotage of a Los Angeles oil refinery. When the man skips bail and heads for Louisiana, Colt gets on the case. S3, Ep13
Colt accepts an assignment to bring in a mysterious hitwoman, rumoured to be an international terrorist who has developed a taste for expensive art. S3, Ep14
The team invest everything in a low budget film to help out a producer friend, but a hit is put out on them when the producer refuses to give in to extortion. S3, Ep15
Colt and Howie head for Argentina to rescue a bail jumper who is sentenced to death for stealing valuable horse embryos. S3, Ep16
At the Sarajevo Winter Olympics, Colt's sister, a professional skier, inadvertently films a kidnapping, which leads to her life being in danger. S3, Ep17
Fantasy adventure with Doug McClure. A submarine and its crew take a wrong turn and discover the unknown land of Caprona, where they find dinosaurs and Neanderthals. (1974)
Crime drama with Eric Roberts. A powerful CEO seeks vengeance for his grandson's death by offering a huge bounty to hunt down the killers, attracting the world's leading assassins. (2023)
Gripping horror. A law student returns home to help his grieving mother sort though his late father's belongings, and discovers a mysterious urn with unimaginable powers. (2018)
Thriller based on true events. It's a toss-up between teeth and the tide when three kayakers find themselves trapped on a small sinking island, stalked by a shark. (2020)

Three actresses (guest stars Joanna Pettet, Britt Ekland and Lana Wood) interrupt work on a James Bond film to help Colt catch smugglers in Hong Kong. S3, Ep18
Crime thriller with Robert De Niro. After a disastrous attempt to rob a casino belonging to a powerful crime boss, two criminals are forced to hijack a bus as they try to make a getaway. (2015)
Thriller with Denzel Washington. A quadriplegic ex-cop helps a rookie officer hunt for a serial killer posing as a cab driver, who takes gruesome trophies from his victims' bodies. (1999)
